_meta.description: Grafana-style alert with a Jenkins job reference. The agent uses Jenkins as a supplementary evidence source — listing recent builds and reading the failed build's console log to correlate a deployment with the incident.
_meta.required_setup: Jenkins configured via 'opensre integrations setup jenkins'; a job named 'demo-fail' with a failed build.

annotations.summary: Error rate spiked on payment-service shortly after a deployment
annotations.description: HTTP 5xx errors on payment-service rose sharply right after a Jenkins deployment. Likely a bad build.

commonAnnotations.summary: Error rate spiked on payment-service shortly after a deployment

title: [FIRING:1] PaymentServiceErrors critical - payment-service
message:
**Firing**

HTTP 5xx error rate on payment-service spiked shortly after a Jenkins deployment.
A recent build of the 'demo-fail' job may have introduced a regression.
Check the recent Jenkins builds for 'demo-fail' and read the failed build's console log.
